title: Model Parameters Schema
description: Defines the configuration parameters that control the behavior and output of a language model

StopSequence.description: A sequence of text that signals the model to stop generating further tokens

id.description: Unique identifier for this parameter configuration

model_id.description: Reference to the model these parameters are configured for

temperature.description:
Controls randomness in the output generation:
- 0.0: Deterministic, focused responses
- 1.0: Balanced creativity
- 2.0: Maximum creativity and randomness

max_tokens.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response. Helps control response length and processing time

top_p.description:
Controls diversity via nucleus sampling:
- 0.1: Very focused on highest probability tokens
- 0.5: Balanced selection
- 1.0: Consider all tokens based on their probabilities

frequency_penalty.description:
Adjusts likelihood of token selection based on their frequency in the text:
- Negative: Favor frequent tokens
- 0: No adjustment
- Positive: Penalize frequent tokens

presence_penalty.description:
Adjusts likelihood of token selection based on their presence in the text:
- Negative: Favor used tokens
- 0: No adjustment
- Positive: Encourage new tokens

top_k.description: Limits token selection to the k highest probability tokens. Lower values increase focus, higher values increase diversity

repetition_penalty.description: Factor applied to penalize repetition in generated text. Higher values make repetition less likely

stop_sequences.description: List of sequences that will cause the model to stop generating further tokens

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when these parameters were created

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last modification to these parameters

metadata.description: Additional metadata about the parameter configuration

tags.description: Tags for categorizing and filtering parameter configurations

description.description: Human-readable description of this parameter configuration's purpose
